/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/window/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/rendering/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/rendering/RendererBackendFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/rendering/backends/metal/MetalRendererBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gameengine.dir/src/rendering/backends/metal/MetalCppImplementation.cpp.o -o gameengine  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3.0.dylib -framework Metal -framework QuartzCore -framework Foundation
